items.titolo: ‘I Actually Thought He Was Going to Hit Me,’ OpenAI’s Greg Brockman Says of Elon Musk
items.descrizione: OpenAI’s president wrapped his testimony on Tuesday by revealing a fiery meeting with Musk in 2017 and subsequent efforts to remove several board members.

items.titolo: Volvo avvia l’integrazione di Google Gemini su oltre 2,5 milioni di auto
items.descrizione: Gemini sostituisce Google Assistant portando a bordo tutti i vantaggi dell’intelligenza artificiale. Un nuovo di fruire la tecnologia a bordo

items.titolo: Google, Microsoft, and xAI agree to let US government test AI models before public release — OpenAI and Anthropic also on board after renegotiating deals with Washington
items.descrizione: OpenAI and Anthropic, which had existing evaluation partnerships with the center dating to 2024, renegotiated their deals to align with priorities in Trump's AI Action Plan.
